summary: M470 — combat sim fix (enemy spells/blocks now fire in sims), 48 more enemy/boss/companion sprite regens, image-review+images.html unified into shared module (247 lines dedup), Supabase combat_history persistence (50 sessions/player), news dropdown viewport-clamp, auto-skill independence, post-combat 1-of-3 reward popup removed, +22 second class builds (every class now ≥2)
